name: GoBeRewarded needed a better listings management solution
client_challenge:
GoBeRewarded was dissatisfied with Yext’s listings management


With rising costs and little sign of innovation from Yext, GoBeRewarded set their sights to new horizons. Their goal? Find an alternative that was more cost effective, had better support, and with more features to leave room for future expansion. When looking for a new software, Aaron Gobidas, CEO of GoBeRewarded, also prioritized finding a company that aligned with his expansion mindset.

‍

GoBeRewarded needed a partner they could trust to manage their clients' online presence. For agencies like GoBeRewarded, the choice of platform is more than filling a need; it determines the success of their business by delivering results to clients. After deciding that Yext wasn't the right solution for their team, Aaron searched for a cost-effective, white-labeled solution that fit his and his company's needs.
highlight: “Most businesses don’t realize this, but getting these little things right is a leg up against the competition,” said Aaron Gobidas, CEO of GoBeRewarded. “The Synup platform gives us the ability to hone our attention to detail, helping our clients perform against the competition.”
client_solution:
Synup provides a cost-effective white-labeled solution 

‍

In business since 2015, GoBeRewarded is no stranger to digital marketing solutions. They needed something that would work in the long-term and grow with their business. Immediately, the team was struck by Synup's simple platform and intuitive functionality.

‍

Crucially, GoBeRewarded needed a white-labeled solution that would impress their clients and ensure their customers' trust. With thousands of competitors in the digital marketing agency space, they needed software that would help them stand out. For businesses like GoBeRewarded, clients need to be oblivious that they're using another platform. Customers don't care where agencies get their software from; they need clear, concise analytics and performance capabilities. Luckily, the company's search led them to Synup.

‍

With review management and listings management, the team can see what people say about their clients, edit and add listings, and respond to reviews on behalf of their clients.

‍

“It’s simple software that’s easy to use,” stated Gobidas. “We’re delivering white-glove service to our clients, and Synup lets us do that at a price that’s affordable for us and our clients.”

‍
the_difference:
Synup gives GoBeRewarded’s clients incredible results


GoBeRewarded loves Synup, but “most of our clients don’t even know we’re using it,” gushed Gobidas. “And we send the white-labeled reports straight to our clients. The whole process is so streamlined.”
‍

The reports bear good news. Across the board:

  • Profile views are up 39%
  • Website visits are up 58%
  • Phone calls are up 134%
  • Direction requests are up 17%
    ‍

For agency partners like GoBeRewarded, Synup doesn’t just impact their bottom line; the success of the platform impacts their clients’ bottom lines, too. With so many accounts, they needed reliable software that they could trust. GoBeRewarded and their customers are all better off for choosing Synup.
